2026-04-20T11:07:25.3467418Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-20T11:07:25.3468507Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-20T11:07:25.3469354Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-20T11:07:25.3470001Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
